title: Short title
doc_html:
SUBPART H.  MILITARY PARENT AND CHILD CUSTODY PROTECTION ACT

§359.  Short title

This Subpart may be cited as the "Military Parent and Child Custody Protection Act".

Acts 2010, No. 739, §1.
